cases.prompt: My manager publicly took credit for my work, and I am considering correcting the record in the same public meeting.

cards.title: Verdict
cards.primary_text: Correcting the record publicly serves truth but requires skillful timing and tone to avoid workplace disruption.

sections.label: Explain simply
sections.text: Your manager's theft of credit violates professional ethics and your rightful recognition. The urge to correct this immediately in public stems from both legitimate grievance and wounded pride.

sections.label: Why this applies to your situation
sections.text:

Gita analysis: The Gita teaches that while we have the right to our actions, we don't control their fruits. Acting from a place of centered clarity rather than emotional reactivity transforms necessary confrontation into dharmic action.
